About

Analyst, consultant,
problem solver.

I'm a Business Intelligence and data analytics professional with over three years of experience in data analytics, consulting, and AI strategy — delivering end-to-end Business Intelligence solutions across the food & beverage, hospitality, energy, healthcare, and nonprofit sectors.

At Everlign, I engineered ETL pipelines that cut Snowflake query runtime by 93% and designed 50+ dashboards for KFC's APAC franchises. At AArete, I built Business Intelligence solutions for hospitality, gaming, and healthcare clients. At Katz, I applied those skills to AI strategy, market entry, and sustainability consulting — completing my MS in Management & Business Analytics in December 2025.

I bring both the technical depth to build a data pipeline and the business acumen to translate it into a strategic recommendation.

Projects

Selected work
& research.

Add image
★ 1st Place
Decision Science · AI Ethics · AHP

Winner — T.L. Saaty Decision-Making Hackathon

Applied the BOCR (Benefits, Opportunities, Costs, Risks) framework and Analytic Network Process via SuperDecisions to evaluate three AI fairness strategies for mental health tools. Sensitivity analysis across 10+ criteria identified retraining on culturally diverse data as optimal for long-term equity, while Human-in-the-Loop oversight is best for cost-constrained or crisis scenarios.

Katz Graduate School of Business · 2025
Add image
★ 1st Place
AI Tools · Health-Tech · Strategy

Winner — AI Tools Innovation Challenge

Built an end-to-end AI-powered business strategy for CareWise, a dementia caregiving solution. Used Claude to simulate AI persona roundtables across the Rogers adoption curve for PMF validation; engineered a 20-factor Excel segmentation model via Claude Code; orchestrated Perplexity + NotebookLM + Claude Code for financial modelling; built an agentic GTM system generating 10 market playbooks in 100 minutes vs. 20 days manually.

Katz Graduate School of Business · 2025
Add image
Fellowship · Market Research

PA Robotics & Technology Fellowship

Pennsylvania Robotics & Technology Fellow & Engagement Director. Conducted a U.S. market study across industries to identify trends, assess demand for Cyrtan Energy's generators, assess risks, and pinpoint potential target companies. Delivered a comprehensive report with market insights, deployment recommendations, and a market research SOP.

Cyrtan Energy · Mar – May 2025
Add image
Nuclear · Strategy · Market Entry

e-Vinci Nuclear Microreactor Market Strategy

Evaluated market viability of Westinghouse's e-Vinci microreactor in Singapore through demand analysis, stakeholder research, and competitive benchmarking. Built a deployment indicator model ranking Singapore in the 80th percentile for viability, and a dynamic global market-sizing model based on nuclear and economic readiness.

Westinghouse Electric Company · Jan – Apr 2025
Add image
Nonprofit · Automation · HIPAA

HIPAA-Compliant Digital Intake System

Assessed Auberle's paper-based client intake inefficiencies and built a HIPAA-compliant digital solution using Adobe Acrobat Pro and Power Automate — enabling offline data capture, signature locking, and automated metadata sync to SQL.

Auberle · Jun – Jul 2025

Research · ESG · AI

AI & Sustainability Research

Analyzed AI's role in corporate sustainability across 20+ flagship initiatives in energy, aviation, agriculture, and logistics — including Microsoft AI for Earth, BrainBox AI, and Alaska Airlines Flyways. Examined the "Net Positive AI" framework for supporting corporate ESG strategy and UN SDG outcomes.
